description_long: This is a three-seater sofa with a boxy, modern silhouette and a uniform, textured brown upholstery. The sofa features three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and evenly spaced. The armrests are straight, thick, and extend from the base to the height of the backrest, creating a solid, enclosed look. The upholstery has a subtle, pebbled or embossed texture that gives the surface a slightly glossy, tactile appearance. No legs are visible, suggesting a block-style base that sits directly on the ground. The overall design is minimalist and robust, suitable for urban public spaces or contemporary interiors.
description: A modern, boxy three-seater sofa with textured brown upholstery, thick armrests, and attached seat and back cushions. The surface has a subtle pebbled texture and a solid, grounded base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest cushions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three evenly spaced seat and back cushions, framed by wide armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the continuous, unbroken back panel and the blocky base with no visible legs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, attached seat cushions and three matching attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, thick, and boxy armrests at each end, extending from the base to the height of the backrest with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the sofa has a solid block-style base that sits directly on the ground, giving a grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest segmented into three attached cushions, matching the seat cushion arrangement.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Uniform pebbled or embossed texture with a subtle glossy finish, no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
